prompt: Update MainLayout.razor to set up a custom MudTheme (primary #0EA5E9, secondary #64748B, border radius 8px, drawer width 280px), follow OS dark-mode preference on first load, AppBar toggle button (sun/moon) that flips modes, persist choice to localStorage. All four required MudBlazor providers in correct order. Existing layout has AppBar 'Acme Dashboard' and a drawer with Home/Users/Settings nav links.

assertions.text: MainLayout.razor includes <MudThemeProvider> with Theme bound to a custom theme field
MudPopoverProvider appears BEFORE MudDialogProvider in the markup (the critical v9 ordering rule)
The custom theme's PaletteLight (and ideally PaletteDark) sets Primary = "#0EA5E9"
The custom theme's PaletteLight (and ideally PaletteDark) sets Secondary = "#64748B"
The component calls GetSystemDarkModeAsync() (the v9 method, not the removed GetSystemPreference) on first render to follow OS preference
The AppBar has a MudIconButton wired to a toggle handler with sun/moon icons (LightMode/DarkMode or similar)
The toggle handler persists the choice to localStorage via IJSRuntime (e.g., localStorage.setItem)
MainLayout.razor preserves the 'Acme Dashboard' app name in the AppBar
MainLayout.razor preserves the Home/Users/Settings NavLinks in the drawer
